_comment: Drop-in PreToolUse hook for the Token Savior Bash rewriter. Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json under the existing 'hooks' key. Default is OFF; set TS_BASH_REWRITE=1 in the Claude Code environment to activate. The rewriter only edits commands matching a known rule (git status / diff / log, tsc, pytest, npm|yarn|pnpm test, cargo test, gh run watch, gh pr list, docker ps); everything else passes through unchanged.
